name: Limeade
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Freshly Squeezed Lime Juice (About 6 limes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the freshly squeezed lime juice, NutraSweet, and cold water in a pitcher.
2. Stir until the sweetener is completely dissolved.
3. Refrigerate the mixture until chilled, about 30 minutes.
4. When ready to serve, fill glasses with ice cubes.
5. Garnish each glass with a lime slice and/or mint sprig, if desired.
6. Serve over ice or enjoy as a slush by processing in an ice crusher, blender, or food processor.
Makes 6 servings of about 8 ounces each.
